title: EcoFlux: Securing a Sustainable Future — Circularity Explained (M2M feed spec: harvested EOL magnets >= HDD/traction-motor size)
HyProMag USA Feasibility Study (750 tpa magnets + 291 tpa co-products; capex US$125M; AISC US$19.6/kg vs US$55/kg market; pre-processing US$1.84/kg; first revenue Q1 2027)
Canadian facility scales up rare earth magnet recycling (Mag-Xtract ~2,200 lb devices/hour; commissioned Sept 2023; 5-6 planned sites)
Noveon Magnetics Completes $215 Million Series C (OneIM $200M lead; capacity beyond 2,000 t/yr)
Noveon, Kangwon Energy and LG Electronics launch closed-loop rare earth magnet recycling initiative (EOL magnets recovered from LG products; M2M reprocessing)
Vulcan Elements forges $1.4B partnership with US Government and ReElement Technologies ($620M DoW OSC loan; $50M Commerce; 10,000 t/yr magnets; EOL recycling focus)
MP Materials-DoD partnership ($110/kg NdPr price floor 10 years; $400M convertible preferred; 10X facility ~10,000 t/yr, commissioning 2028)
Western Digital, Microsoft launch initiative to recycle critical minerals from disused data center equipment (50,000 lb shredded HDDs/caddies; acid-free dissolution from CMI Hub; CMR + PedalPoint)

Global Initiative Mines Retired Hard Disk Drives for Materials and Magnets (iNEMI VRP; ~20M drives/yr retired from major US data centers; ORNL 7,200 drives/day; Urban Mining intact-drive magnet removal; reuse >> scrap)

How companies improve critical raw material circularity: 5 use cases (Hitachi HDD disassembler 140 HDD/h vs manual 10-12/h; 26 t magnets in 6 years = ~10% of Hitachi need; automation improved economics)

Exploring mass and economic potentials of rare earth elements recycling from electric vehicles at end-of-life (EV fleet 30M 2022 -> ~250M 2030; 0.6-1.7 kg NdFeB per vehicle teardowns; EU NdFeB demand 10 kt 2020 -> ~60 kt 2050; recycling could meet 24-48% EU demand by 2040; manual magnet dismantling economically unviable)
US11611266B2 — Automated recovery of rare earth permanent magnets from electric machines (UT-Battelle/ORNL; robot training station for unknown SKUs; ~160 motors/day; granted 2023-03-21, expires 2041)

US11250980B2 — System and method for the recycling of rare earth magnets (UT-Battelle; HDD punch/waterjet/laser extraction; Curie-temperature demag; intact magnet recovery from mixed 2.5"/3.5" streams; granted 2022-02-15)

Proposal for ELV Regulation COM(2023)451 (Art. 30 removal of Annex VII Part C parts before shredding; Art. 7 removability of EV batteries and e-drive motors; e-drive motors contain important quantities of rare earths)
New rules for a more sustainable EU automotive sector (EP plenary approves ELV Regulation 2026-06-18, 437-112-20; applies 24 months after entry into force; recycled plastic 15%/25%)

Regulation (EU) 2024/1252 (CRMA) — Arts. 27-29: permanent-magnet product scope (EVs, wind, MRI, industrial robots, motors, appliances), labelling/data carriers, recycled-content disclosure then delegated-act minimum shares; 2030 recycling-capacity benchmark 25% of EU consumption
publisher: EUR-Lex / Official Journal of the EU

title: 钕铁硼废料价格 (NdFeB scrap prices: PrNd>=20% 770-780 元/kg contained, tax-incl., 2026-07-02; Dy 1,250-1,280; Tb 5,600-5,800 元/kg)
华宏科技：稀土永磁材料年产能1.5万吨，再生稀土氧化物产能1.2万吨/年 (Huahong/Xintai capacities; 2024 output ~115 t Dy2O3, ~25 t Tb4O7; recycled REE >60% of revenue)
格林美数字化平台深挖“城市矿山” (GEM Wuhan: robotic automated battery-pack dismantling lines; 250 kt/yr scrap vehicles; 50 kt/yr e-waste; 45 kt/yr power-battery target)
如何看待大规模设备更新政策 (China motors consume ~4.5万亿 kWh/yr; 5pp efficiency gain = ~60 Mt coal-equivalent savings; equipment-investment +25% by 2027 target)
publisher: 国家发展和改革委员会 NDRC

title: 废旧电机拆解设备报价 ¥34,000 (河北鑫鹏机械; hammer-crush rotor + stator copper pulling — commodity Chinese motor-dismantling price signal)
Molg raises $5.5M seed (Closed Loop Partners lead; Amazon Climate Pledge Fund, ABB Robotics & Automation Ventures; microfactories at Sims + hyperscaler ITADs; laptops/servers scope)
Inside Apple's efforts to build a better recycling robot (Daisy: 1.2M iPhones/yr, 2 units, patents offered free — 'no one has yet to take Apple up on the offer')
NIST SP 800-88 Rev.1 Guidelines for Media Sanitization (definition; withdrawn 2025-09-26, superseded by Rev.2 — basis of data-center drive-destruction practice)
ADIR — Next generation urban mining: automated disassembly, separation and recovery of valuable materials from electronic equipment (H2020, ended 2019, not commercialized)
